ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.notes: Original EU Certificate of Origin issued by ICC/West Sweden Chamber of Commerce. Text-based, clearly readable. Certificate number SEG-25D-421251.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.notes: Customs invoice issued by Ericsson AB. Invoice No. 9209875120, dated 16-12-2025. Text-based, clearly readable.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-25D-421251' and remarks '7200226842' do not contain LC-related bank term labels. Standard verification applies.

locations_found: Invoice footer: 'Ericsson AB' appears multiple times in the footer block (VAT No, Reg. office, address block)
Invoice footer: 'Ericsson AB Torshamnsgatan 23 S-164 80 STOCKHOLM SWEDEN'
Invoice header: 'ERICSSON' logo/branding at top of page
consignor_search_result.notes: Ericsson AB is the issuer/seller of the invoice. The name appears in the header branding, footer address block, VAT registration block, and registered office block.

criteria_met: Consignor 'ERICSSON AB' identified as invoice issuer (footer, header branding)
Consignee 'SEETON GROUP LLC' matches invoice 'Invoice to' and 'Customer/Sold to' fields
Shipment number 7200226842 in certificate remarks matches invoice shipment number
pairing_validation.motivation: All three pairing criteria are satisfied: consignor matches invoice issuer, consignee matches invoice-to party, and shipment reference matches. Valid document pair.

candidates.raw_text: BUILDING 4, 4th FLOOR, GARMATNA STREET, 03067 KYIV, UKRAINE
candidates.normalized_text: building 4, 4th floor, garmatna street, 03067 kyiv, ukraine

candidates.source: Invoice line item 2.1 'Country of origin' column

checkpoints.invoice_value: Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN (invoice footer/issuer)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'ERICSSON AB' anywhere in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Ericsson AB found in invoice footer address block ('Ericsson AB Torshamnsgatan 23 S-164 80 STOCKHOLM SWEDEN'), VAT block ('Ericsson AB VAT No: SE556056625801'), registered office ('Ericsson AB Stockholm, Sweden'), and header branding ('ERICSSON'). Ericsson AB is the invoice issuer.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignor name with invoice issuer name
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'ERICSSON AB'. Invoice footer: 'Ericsson AB'. After case normalization: identical. Same legal entity.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignor country with invoice issuer country
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice footer address: 'SWEDEN'. Additionally confirmed by VAT prefix 'SE' in SE556056625801 (4.1.2.1). Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found in invoice issuer/footer block
Country verified via VAT prefix SE

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'ERICSSON AB' at 'TORSHAMNSGATAN 23, 164 80, STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN'. Invoice is issued by 'Ericsson AB' at 'Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN' as shown in the footer. Name match is exact after case normalization. Country is SWEDEN in both. VAT number SE556056625801 confirms Swedish registration. Direct match via 4.1.0 (consignor found as invoice issuer).
checkpoints.motivation: Consignor 'ERICSSON AB' is the invoice issuer 'Ericsson AB' — identical name after case normalization. Address matches: Torshamnsgatan 23, 164 80 Stockholm, Sweden. Country Sweden confirmed by explicit address and VAT prefix SE. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: SEETON GROUP LLC, BUILDING 4, 4th FLOOR, GARMATNA STREET, 03067 KYIV, UKRAINE
checkpoints.invoice_value: SEETON GROUP LLC, BUILDING 4, 4th FLOOR, GARMATNA STREET, 03067 KYIV, UKRAINE (Invoice to / Customer/Sold to)

comparison_steps.details: Invoice 'Invoice to' field contains: 'SEETON GROUP LLC, BUILDING 4, 4th FLOOR, GARMATNA STREET, 03067 KYIV, UKRAINE'. This matches certificate consignee exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice Invoice-to name
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'SEETON GROUP LLC'. Invoice Invoice-to: 'SEETON GROUP LLC'. Exact match after case normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee country with invoice Invoice-to country

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 - primary billing field 'Invoice to' used
MATCH determined - name and country verified

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'SEETON GROUP LLC' at 'BUILDING 4, 4th FLOOR, GARMATNA STREET, 03067 KYIV, UKRAINE'. Invoice 'Invoice to' field (primary billing field per 4.2.0.2) contains 'SEETON GROUP LLC, BUILDING 4, 4th FLOOR, GARMATNA STREET, 03067 KYIV, UKRAINE'. Name: exact match. Address: exact match. Country: UKRAINE in both. Additionally confirmed by 'Customer/Sold to' field which also shows 'SEETON GROUP LLC' at the same address. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Use Consignee/Ship to address (ZROSHUVALNA 5B, 02099 KYIV) as primary comparison
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Per 4.2.0.2, the 'Invoice to' field has priority over 'Ship to' fields. The 'Invoice to' field already provides a direct match, so Ship-to is not needed. The different Ship-to address does not affect the result per 4.2.4.

checkpoints.motivation: Consignee 'SEETON GROUP LLC' at 'BUILDING 4, 4th FLOOR, GARMATNA STREET, 03067 KYIV, UKRAINE' matches exactly the invoice 'Invoice to' field. Name and country UKRAINE both verified. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value:
TELECOM EQUIPMENT
CN - Заземлення ПЧ 10мм Ericsson ML
checkpoints.invoice_value: Goods Marking: Mobile Telecom Equipment; Line item description: Заземлення ПЧ 10мм Ericsson ML

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.details: Certificate does not contain explicit article/product numbers in the goods description field. The 'CN' prefix appears to be a country code reference, not a product number. Invoice has product number 'NGT 211 04/7' but certificate does not reference it. Per 4.3.2, article number matching is only required when article numbers ARE stated in the certificate. Since no article numbers are stated in the certificate, proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 - Priority 2: Text matching - identifying main designation
comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate
comparison_steps.details: Certificate goods description has two parts: (1) 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' as the general product category, and (2) 'Заземлення ПЧ 10мм Ericsson ML' as the specific product description. The identity-bearing main designation is the specific description 'Заземлення ПЧ 10мм Ericsson ML'.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Заземлення ПЧ 10мм Ericsson ML' in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice line item 2.1 description: 'Заземлення ПЧ 10мм Ericsson ML' — exact match with certificate's specific product description after normalization of spaces. The ПЧ and 10мм components match exactly.

Certificate states 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT'. Invoice 'Goods Marking' field states 'Mobile Telecom Equipment'. The certificate's text 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' is identifiable in the invoice's 'Mobile Telecom Equipment' — the certificate's designation is a subset found within the invoice text. 'Mobile' is an additional non-identity-bearing prefix per 4.3.4. The identity-bearing main designation 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' is present in both.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'Заземлення ПЧ 10мм Ericsson ML' found exactly in invoice line item
Additional prefix 'Mobile' in invoice does not alter product identity

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description contains 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' and 'Заземлення ПЧ 10мм Ericsson ML'. No article numbers are stated in the certificate, so Priority 2 (text matching) applies. The specific product description 'Заземлення ПЧ 10мм Ericsson ML' is found verbatim in the invoice line item 2.1 description column. The general category 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' matches the invoice's 'Goods Marking: Mobile Telecom Equipment' where 'Mobile' is a non-identity-bearing addition per 4.3.4. Both components of the goods description can be identified in the invoice. MATCH per 4.3.3 and 4.3.4.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate says 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' while invoice says 'Mobile Telecom Equipment'
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Per 4.3.4, additions before/after the identity-bearing main designation that do not change product model/variant/identity are permitted. 'Mobile' is a non-identity-bearing prefix. The core designation 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' is identifiable in both documents.

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate's specific product description 'Заземлення ПЧ 10мм Ericsson ML' is found verbatim in invoice line item 2.1. General category 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' is identifiable in invoice's 'Mobile Telecom Equipment'. MATCH.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Total gross weight: 118,500 KG; Number of packages: 7 BOXES

comparison_steps.description: Determine which quantity in certificate is the verification basis
comparison_steps.details: Box 7 contains 'G.W 118,500 KG'. This is the primary verification-basis quantity per 4.4.2.1. Box 6 contains '7 PACKAGES' as a secondary quantity (shipment quantity per 4.4.3.2). Per 4.4.2.1, box 7 value takes precedence.
Certificate states 'G.W' (Gross Weight) with unit 'KG'. Weight category (GW) and unit (KG) are both explicitly stated. Per 4.4.2.2, requirements met.

Invoice 'Total gross weight' field states '118,500 KG'. Certificate states 'G.W 118,500 KG'. The numeric value 118,500 is interpreted as 118.500 (using comma as thousands separator in the European notation context, or as a decimal — but given the invoice also states '118,500 KG' in the same format and separately states '96,000 KG' as net weight, the consistent notation confirms 118,500 = 118.5 or 118500). Analysis: The invoice uses European notation where comma is thousands separator: 118,500 KG = 118500 KG. Certificate uses same format: 118,500 KG. Both values are identical in notation and represent the same number. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Verify no contradicting quantity in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice also states 'Total net weight: 96,000 KG'. Certificate only states GW (not NW). Per 4.4.3.1, since certificate does not state NW, the invoice's NW value of 96,000 KG does not constitute a contradiction. Only one weight category (GW) is verified, and it matches.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value (G.W 118,500 KG) used as verification basis
Weight category (GW) and unit (KG) explicitly stated
Numeric value 118,500 KG matches invoice's Total gross weight 118,500 KG
At least one quantity verified (GW); no contradictions for stated values

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states 'G.W 118,500 KG'. This is the verification-basis quantity per 4.4.2.1. Invoice 'Total gross weight' field states '118,500 KG'. The numeric values and units are identical. Weight category GW is explicitly stated in certificate and matches invoice's 'Total gross weight' label. Additionally, certificate box 6 states '7 PACKAGES' and invoice states '7 BOXES' in the 'Number of packages' field — this shipment quantity also matches (7 = 7). Per 4.4.3.1, at least one quantity is verified (GW matches), and no contradictions exist for the stated category. Certificate does not state NW, so invoice's NW (96,000 KG) is not a contradiction. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate says '7 PACKAGES' but invoice says '7 BOXES'
rejected_hypotheses.reason: The primary verification is of box 7 (G.W 118,500 KG) which matches. The package count '7' matches numerically. 'PACKAGES' vs 'BOXES' is a variation in packaging terminology, not a quantity discrepancy. Per 4.4.3, unit matching is not required — only numeric value matching.

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate's G.W 118,500 KG (box 7) matches exactly the invoice's Total gross weight 118,500 KG. Weight category GW and unit KG are explicit in both. MATCH.

checkpoints.invoice_value: CN (Country of origin column, line item 2.1)

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin designation in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has a dedicated 'Country of origin' column in the line items table. Line item 2.1 states 'CN' as Country of origin.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate origin with invoice origin after normalization
comparison_steps.details: Certificate box 3: 'CN'. Invoice line item 2.1 Country of origin: 'CN'. Exact match — both use ISO alpha-2 code 'CN' for China.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in dedicated 'Country of origin' column in invoice
ISO code normalization — CN = CN, exact match
MATCH — origin CN positively verified in invoice

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'CN' as country of origin. Invoice has an explicit 'Country of origin' column in the line item table. Line item 2.1 states 'CN'. Both documents use the ISO alpha-2 code 'CN' (China). Exact match. Per 4.5 note: origin CN (China) differs from consignor country Sweden — this is explicitly permitted and does not affect the result. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certificate origin 'CN' (China) exactly matches invoice's 'Country of origin: CN' in the line item column. MATCH.

SEETON GROUP LLC BUILDING 4 , 4th FLOOR GARMATNA STREET 03067 KYIV UKRAINE
SEETON GROUP LLC BUILDING 4 , 4th FLOOR GARMATNA STREET 03067 KYIV UKRAINE

evidence.section: Line item 2.1 - Country of origin column

rule_evaluation_log.details: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-25D-421251 contains 'S' not 'LC' as bank term. Remarks field contains shipment number 7200226842. No LC-related labels found.
Document A (Certificate of Origin) identified as certificate file. Document B (Invoice) identified as invoice file. Single certificate and single invoice. No ambiguity.
Three criteria met: (1) Shipment reference 7200226842 matches; (2) Consignor ERICSSON AB is invoice issuer; (3) Consignee SEETON GROUP LLC matches Invoice-to field.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Group structure - consignor search in all invoice pages
rule_evaluation_log.details: ERICSSON AB found as invoice issuer in footer blocks. Direct match — no need to proceed to 4.1.3 sequential examination.
VAT prefix SE in SE556056625801 confirms Sweden. Additionally, explicit address 'SWEDEN' in footer.
SWEDEN = SWEDEN. Exact match.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Consignee priority order - primary billing field
rule_evaluation_log.details: Invoice has 'Invoice to' field with SEETON GROUP LLC. This is the primary billing field and takes priority.
SEETON GROUP LLC = SEETON GROUP LLC. Exact match.
UKRAINE = UKRAINE. Exact match.
Certificate does not contain explicit article/product numbers. Invoice contains 'NGT 211 04/7' but this is not referenced in the certificate. Proceed to Priority 2.

Identity-bearing main designation 'Заземлення ПЧ 10мм Ericsson ML' found verbatim in invoice line item 2.1. General category 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' identifiable in invoice 'Goods Marking: Mobile Telecom Equipment'.
'Mobile' in invoice 'Mobile Telecom Equipment' is a non-identity-bearing prefix that does not change the product identity.
Box 7 contains 'G.W 118,500 KG'. This is the primary verification-basis quantity.
GW explicitly stated, KG explicitly stated. Requirements met.
Certificate 118,500 KG GW = Invoice Total gross weight 118,500 KG. Identical values.
Certificate states only GW. Invoice states both GW (118,500 KG) and NW (96,000 KG). Since certificate does not state NW, there is no contradiction. GW verified as MATCH.
Certificate box 6 states '7 PACKAGES'. Invoice states '7 BOXES'. This is a secondary/supplementary quantity. 7 = 7 numerically. Not required for verification since GW already matches.
Invoice has dedicated 'Country of origin' column. Line 2.1 states 'CN'.
CN = CN. ISO alpha-2 code. Exact match.
Certificate origin CN verified in invoice origin column CN.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändare Ericsson AB i Sverige, mottagare Seeton Group LLC i Ukraina, varubeskrivning (telecomutrustning), bruttovikt 118 500 kg och ursprungsland CN (Kina) kan samtliga verifieras exakt mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor (Ericsson AB, Sweden) is the invoice issuer with exact name and address match. Consignee (Seeton Group LLC, Ukraine) matches the Invoice-to field exactly. Goods description ('Telecom Equipment' and specific Ukrainian-language product description) found verbatim in invoice. Gross weight 118,500 KG matches exactly. Country of origin CN matches exactly. No discrepancies identified.
non_blocking_observations: Invoice 'Consignee/Ship to' address (ZROSHUVALNA 5B, 02099 KYIV) differs from 'Invoice to' address (GARMATNA STREET, 03067 KYIV) — both for SEETON GROUP LLC. This is a normal commercial arrangement (billing vs delivery address) and does not affect verification.
Certificate remarks '7200226842' matches invoice 'Shipment number: 7200226842', providing additional cross-reference confirmation.

output_quality_checks.notes: All five checkpoints are MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL. All confidence values are above 0.85 threshold. No inconsistencies detected.
